english_text:
Encompassing Sphere
Spheres
Saqra (innermost)
Length
Width
Depth
alt_text: An egg/oval-shaped cosmological vessel viewed in cross-section. Three nested layers are labeled in Arabic: 'فلک محیط' (Encompassing Sphere) outermost, 'افلاک' (Spheres) middle, 'سقراء' (Saqra, the central yellow sphere) innermost. The English dimensional labels Length, Width, and Depth are placed on three perpendicular interior axes, depicting the three-dimensional spatial structure of the cosmos.
notes: Diagram of the three nested cosmological spheres with the three Euclidean dimensions (length/width/depth) inscribed on the innermost. Pairs with image 005 which zooms into the central first-depth detail.
